name: @umbraculum/brewery-core
description: Brewery-vertical brewing calculations (gravity, water chemistry) and brewing-specific unit conversions. Brewery-vertical scope: this package contains brewing-domain math (saccharomyces, mash water profiles, OG/FG/ABV, etc.) and is NOT loaded by non-brewery verticals. Renamed from @brewery/core to @umbraculum/brewery-core (NOT @umbraculum/core) as sub-plan #9 slot 6 (2026-05-19) per plan doc §1.3 trap-avoidance — the bare @umbraculum/core is reserved for a future platform-core framework package.
